case_title: APOYO FINANCIERO, INC. VS. CLAUDIA ABREGO BARRILAS

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BARRILAS, CLAUDIA ABREGO $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,590.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION FOR ORDER CORRECTING NAME IN JUDGMENT FILED BY APOYO IS GRANTED. NO APPEARANCES. JUDGE PRO TEM: DIANA PEEBLES; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT BARRILAS, CLAUDIA ABREGO
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY APOYO FINANCIERO, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT BARRILAS, CLAUDIA ABREGO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-16-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 40.00 - SERVED OCT-13-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BARRILAS, CLAUDIA ABREGO

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-16-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-16-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY CAROLINA PALACIOS--CUSTOMER SERVICE REPRESENTATIVE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER AND ANSWER FILED BY PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT BARRILAS, CLAUDIA ABREGO
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-16-2015 - JUDGMENT.
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT BARRILAS, CLAUDIA ABREGO
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO, INC.
NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION FOR ORDER CORRECTING NAME IN JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO, INC. HEARING SET FOR MAY-05-2017 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $447.30 ACCRUED INTEREST, $200.00 ACCRUED COSTS AS TO PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO, INC.
